block_00: 3 steps to becoming a short-term stock trader
block_01: Some investors prefer holding stocks for years, working on their portfolio and patiently waiting for returns in the long run. However, for some traders, who are looking for a positive outcome, short-term trading may be the option. This method is associated with higher risk, however, there are ways to improve one’s approach.
block_02: In this article, we look into several rules that may help traders spot the appropriate for short-term trading stocks. We also explain why technical analysis and hedging of the risks are crucial for this type of trading.
block_03: Check the full version to learn about the important steps on the way to short-term stock trading.
